author: IGN YouTube
text:
Amanda the Adventurer 3 - Official Console Release Date Announcement Trailer
Check out the Release Date Announcement Trailer for Amanda the Adventurer 3, an exploration puzzle interaction horror game developed by MangledMaw Games. Players will experience the finale in the epic horror trilogy as Riley uncovers deep truths about Amanda, Hameln, and a plague affecting the town of Kensdale. Solve escape-room puzzles, explore the abandoned Hameln facility, and more in Amanda The Adventurer 3, launching on May 28 for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and Nintendo Switch 2, with the game being available now on PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Open-World Lord of the Rings RPG Announced by Kingdom Come: Deliverance Developer - IGN Daily Fix
In today's Daily Fix:
Warhorse Studios, the developers behind the popular sim-heavy RPG series, Kingdom Come: Deliverance, have announced a Lord of the Rings open-world game. Details are practially nonexistent, but it's Lord of the Rings and it's an open-world game, so fans should be excited. In other news, Ubisoft has braced shareholders to expect some lean financial quarters coming up, despite the launch of the highly anticipated Assassin's Creed: Black Flag Resynced. Ubisoft also teased new AC games, along with new entries in Ghost Recon and Far Cry in the coming years. And finally, Sony has announced a State of Play for June 2nd starting at 2pm PT. Headlining the showcase is Marvel's Wolverine.
And if you're thinking about joining us in Los Angeles for IGN Live 2026, we're giving you the chance to win a free ticket by using promo code IGN30PROMO, as part of IGN's 30th anniversary celebrations. Find out more at ign.com/live.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Masters of the Universe - Official Final Trailer (2026) Nicholas Galitzine, Jared Leto
Don't miss the Final Trailer for Masters of the Universe, an upcoming live-action adventure movie based on Mattel’s classic 80’s toy brand. Masters of the Universe stars Nicholas Galitzine, Camila Mendes, Alison Brie, James Purefoy, Morena Baccarin, Jóhannes Haukur Jóhannesson, Charlotte Riley, featuring Kristen Wiig as the voice of “Roboto” with Jared Leto and Idris Elba. Witness an '80s classic come to life in Masters of the Universe, in theaters on June 5, 2026.

In Masters of the Universe, Director Travis Knight brings the legendary franchise back to the big screen in this epic live-action adventure. After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam (Nicholas Galitzine) back to Eternia where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor (Jared Leto). To save his family and his world, Adam must join forces with his closest allies, Teela (Camila Mendes) and Duncan/Man-At-Arms (Idris Elba), and embrace his true destiny as He-Man — the most powerful man in the universe.

The screenplay is by Chris Butler and Aaron Nee & Adam Nee & Dave Callaham. The story is by Aaron Nee & Adam Nee and Alex Litvak & Michael Finch. Based on Masters of the Universe by Mattel. It is produced by Todd Black, Jason Blumenthal, Robbie Brenner, and DeVon Franklin. Ynon Kreiz, Bill Bannerman, and David Bloomfield serve as executive producers. 

Masters of the Universe opens in theaters on June 5, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight - First 23 Minutes of Gameplay
Check out the first 23 minutes of gameplay of Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight in 4K 60 FPS!
 
Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is a mashup of many Batman stories, including Christopher Nolan's Batman Trilogy, Matt Reeves's The Batman, and even the 1989 Michael Keaton classic. Team up with Jim Gordon, Robin, Catwoman and more as you explore an open-world Arkham City.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Stranger Than Heaven - Official Story Overview Trailer
Don't miss the Story Overview Trailer for Stranger Than Heaven, an upcoming action-adventure beat 'em up game developed by Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio. Players will follow a man over the course of a fifty-year period as he traverses through five different eras and regions of his life. Take a deeper look at the game's narrative, filled with extreme violence and a yearning for home across multiple iterations of Japan. Stranger Than Heaven is coming soon to PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Xbox Cloud, and PC (Steam and Xbox on PC).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby - Official 20th Anniversary Trailer
Watch the 20th Anniversary Trailer for Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby, the hit comedic NASCAR film distributed by Columbia Pictures. Witness the epic return of Ricky Bobby to the big screen with the 20th anniversary of Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby, in theaters on June 28, June 30, and July 1. 

NASCAR stock car racing sensation Ricky Bobby is a national hero because of his "win at all costs" approach. He and his loyal racing partner, childhood friend Cal Naughton Jr., are a fearless duo -- "Thunder" and "Lightning" by their fans for their ability to finish so many races in the #1 and #2 positions, with Cal always in second place. When flamboyant French Formula One driver Jean Girard challenges "Thunder" and "Lightning" for the supremacy of NASCAR, Ricky Bobby must face his own demons and fight Girard for the right to be known as racing's top driver. 

Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby stars Will Ferrell, John C. Reilly, Sacha Baron Cohen, Gary Cole, Michael Clarke Duncan, and more. The film is directed by Adam McKay and written by Will Ferrell and Adam McKay.

Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby is in theaters on June 28, June 30, and July 1.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Boys Series Finale Review
If there’s any one complaint that can be leveled against The Boys Season 5, it’s that the series has taken too long to get to the good stuff. The back half of the season has been solid, but the road to get there was pretty rough at times. Our main concern heading into the series finale was that The Boys left itself with too much ground to cover in one episode. Can “Blood and Bone” really tie up all the lingering loose ends and give us a truly satisfying payoff to the years-long conflict between our heroes and Antony Starr’s Homelander? As it turns out, yes, it can. Check out our full, spoiler-filled review of the final episode of The Boys.

The Boys stars Karl Urban, Jack Quaid, Antony Starr, Erin Moriarty, Jessie T. Usher, Laz Alonso, Chace Crawford, Tomer Capone, Karen Fukuhara, Nathan Mitchell, Colby Minifie, Susan Heyward, Valorie Curry, Daveed Diggs, and Cameron Crovetti. The final episode is streaming now on Prime Video.

#IGN #TheBoys #SeasonFinale

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight - Best Skills and Mission Upgrades
Between purchasable skills and gadget upgrades, there is a surprising amount of character progression available in Lego Batman Legacy of the Dark Knight. Not all skills are created equal, as I found some are much more useful than others. That’s why we created this list of the best upgrades to prioritize as you adventure throughout Gotham City.

Intro 0:00
Skill System Overview - 0:32
Big Hearted Skill 1:24
Hyper Combo Skill 1:55 
Scan the Scene Skill 2:40
Glide Takedown Skill 3:02
Collectible Detective Skill 3:28
Extra Focus Skill 4:03
Gadget Upgrade System Overview 4:33
Perch Takedown Gadget Upgrade 5:21
Vault Slam Gadget Upgrade 5:40
Batclaw Fling Gadget Upgrade 6:15
Outro 6:39

#IGN #LegoBatmanLegacyOfTheDarkKnight #Batman

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marvel Rivals - Official 'Daredevil's Shadowed Start' Costume Trailer
Don't miss the 'Daredevil's Shadowed Start' Costume Trailer for Marvel Rivals, the hit free-to-play action team-based hero game developed by NetEase Games. Players can attain a new Daredevil skin inspired by his iconic appearance in Daredevil: The Man Without Fear (1993) #4. Take part in the Devil's Debut Event to pop balloons and earn rewards, including the 'Daredevil's Shadowed Start' Costume, running from May 21 through June 18 in Marvel Rivals for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Aliens: Fireteam Elite 2 – Specialist Class Overview | IGN First
Get a detailed look at the new Specialist class in Aliens: Fireteam Elite 2, the upcoming four-player, third-person PvE shooter sequel where you'll be blasting hordes of Xenomorphs. The Specialist class must be unlocked be leveling up the other classes, and once you do you'll be able to build almost any Specialist character you want. Aliens: Fireteam Elite 2 will be released this summer for PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X|S. 
Wishlist it on Steam if you're interested: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3448650/Aliens_Fireteam_Elite_2/

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Kill Fish in Subnautica 2 (Killable Creatures Mod)
Fresh from its huge early access launch, underwater survival and crafting adventure game Subnautica 2 has sparked a significant debate among fans: to kill or not to kill the fish. Naturally, the modding community didn't wait around for an official answer. Check out the Killable Creatures mod! This massive game-changer finally allows you to fight back and kill whatever you choose. No more running away, it’s time for some sweet revenge.

Killable Creatures
https://www.nexusmods.com/subnautica2/mods/105
Created by jibotron

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marathon - Official Triage Shell Cinematic Trailer
Don't miss the Triage Shell Cinematic Trailer for Marathon, the hit first-person extraction shooter developed by Bungie. Players will witness the valuable and resourceful shell Triage, the game's medic class that provides healing drones for the team and revives downed teammates in the heat of battle. Play as Triage in Marathon, available now for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Poppy Playtime: Chapter 5 - Official Console Release Date Trailer
Watch the Console Release Date Trailer for Poppy Playtime: Chapter 5, the hit horror puzzle adventure game developed by Mob Entertainment. Players will endure the frights and horrors of Chapter 5, which sees new areas of the factory and a confrontation with The Prototype. Poppy Playtime: Chapter 5 is launching on May 27 for PlayStation, Xbox, and Nintendo Switch, with the game being available now on PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Freefall '95 - Official Release Date Trailer
Your plane has exploded in midair, and as you plummet to the Earth, sans parachute, you are the only survivor – until you pancake into the ground, anyway. Go out in style as you do aerial tricks and stunts during your freefall to the ground below. Freefall '95 will be released for PC on June 1. Wishlist it on Steam (and play the demo!) if you're interested: https://store.steampowered.com/app/4144510/Freefall_95/

text:
Stranger Than Heaven - Official Combat Overview Trailer
Take a look at the Combat Overview Trailer for Stranger Than Heaven, an upcoming action-adventure beat 'em up game developed by Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio. Players will follow a man over the course of a fifty-year period as he traverses through five different eras and regions of his life. Master the art of combat, wield a variety of weapons, and continue the search for a home.
